Master Aesthetician

Elvira
Kravtsov

Over 15 years of expertise in advanced skincare, luxury beauty services, and results-driven treatments — from Europe to Winnipeg.

Her Story
A Career Built
on Excellence

Elvira Kravtsov is a highly accomplished aesthetician with over 15 years of experience in advanced skincare and luxury beauty services. She began her career in Europe in 2001 as a certified beauty consultant and lead representative for globally recognized brands such as PUPA, Juvena, and L'Oréal.

Over five years in Europe, she developed a refined standard of excellence in skin health, product knowledge, and client care — a foundation that would define her entire career.

In 2006, Elvira relocated to Canada, where she advanced her education at MC College, graduating in December 2010. She went on to build a distinguished career at Jerry's Salon & Spa, dedicating 12 years to the industry and serving six years as Spa Coordinator — combining leadership with an elevated client experience.

Elvira earned her prestigious Red Seal certification in 2024 — a national recognition of her expertise and professionalism. In 2020 she joined Ten Spa, one of Manitoba's most renowned luxury destinations. In 2023, she opened her own private, home-based studio offering an exclusive, personalized skincare experience designed around results, comfort, and discretion.

Career Milestones
A Journey of Excellence
2001
Europe — Career Begins

Certified beauty consultant and lead brand representative for PUPA, Juvena, and L'Oréal across European markets.

2003
Private Studio Opens

Opened her first private studio in Europe, offering personalized skincare services and building a loyal clientele with a focus on results-driven treatments.

2006
Canada — New Chapter

Relocated to Canada and enrolled at MC College to advance her education and professional training in aesthetics.

2010
MC College Graduate

Graduated from MC College in December with advanced aesthetics credentials, laying the groundwork for her Canadian career.

2011
Jerry's Salon & Spa

Joined Jerry's Salon & Spa, dedicating 12 years to the team and rising to Spa Coordinator — overseeing operations and client experience.

2020
Ten Spa — Luxury Level

Joined Ten Spa, one of Manitoba's most renowned luxury spa destinations, delivering high-end results-driven treatments to discerning clientele.

2024
Red Seal Certified

Earned the prestigious Red Seal certification — a nationally recognized mark of professional excellence and mastery in her field, crowning over two decades of dedicated work in the aesthetics industry.

Your Skin Deserves the Best.

Private studio · Winnipeg, Manitoba
Signature Treatments

Services

Every treatment is tailored to your unique skin. Using GM Collin's clinical protocols and 15 years of expertise, Elvira delivers visible, lasting results in a private, luxurious setting.

01
Advanced
Microneedling
Collagen Induction Therapy

A clinically proven treatment that stimulates your skin's natural collagen production through controlled micro-channels. Dramatically improves texture, tone, fine lines, and scarring with minimal downtime.

  • Reduces fine lines and deep wrinkles
  • Improves acne scarring and hyperpigmentation
  • Enhances product absorption up to 80%
  • Tightens and firms skin texture
02
Medical-Grade
Chemical Peels
Skin Renewal & Resurfacing

Professional-strength exfoliation using GM Collin's advanced peel formulations. Removes damaged surface cells to reveal smoother, brighter, more youthful skin — customized to your skin type and concerns.

  • Brightens dull, uneven skin tone
  • Targets sun damage and age spots
  • Softens fine lines and rough texture
  • Stimulates cellular renewal
03
Deep Cleansing
& Skin Renewal
Purifying Clarifying Treatment

A thorough purifying treatment that deeply cleanses pores, removes impurities, and restores skin balance. Perfect for congested, oily, or combination skin — leaving you with a clear, radiant, refined complexion.

  • Deep pore cleansing and extraction
  • Balances oil production
  • Calms inflammation and redness
  • Improves skin clarity and radiance
04
Bespoke
Facials
Anti-Aging · Acne · Rosacea

Fully customized facial treatments designed around your individual skin goals. Whether targeting aging, acne, rosacea, or overall rejuvenation — each session is personally crafted using GM Collin's luxury protocols.

  • Anti-aging and lifting facials
  • Acne control and prevention
  • Rosacea and sensitive skin care
  • Hydration and brightening treatments
Your Experience
The Treatment Process
01
Consultation

In-depth skin analysis and personalized treatment planning tailored to your goals

02
Preparation

Gentle cleansing and skin preparation using GM Collin's professional protocols

03
Treatment

Expert application of your chosen service in a calm, private, luxurious setting

04
Aftercare

Personalized homecare guidance and follow-up plan to maintain your results

Premium Skincare

GM Collin
Paris

A luxury, clinically proven skincare line developed in Canada and inspired by France — trusted by leading professionals worldwide for its advanced dermatological research and visible results.

The Brand
Science Meets
Luxury

GM Collin is a premium, clinically proven skincare line originating from Canada. Known for its advanced dermatological research, innovative formulations, and high-performance ingredients, GM Collin is trusted by leading professionals worldwide.

The brand focuses on visible, long-lasting results while maintaining skin health and balance — perfectly aligning with Elvira's philosophy of combining science, luxury, and personalized care.

Each product is developed using cutting-edge biotechnology and rigorously tested to meet the highest standards of safety and efficacy. From serums to treatment creams, every formulation is designed to deliver measurable, transformative results.

Brand Philosophy
Four Pillars of Excellence
Clinically
Proven

Every formulation undergoes rigorous dermatological testing to ensure measurable, reproducible results on all skin types

Clean &
Safe Formulas

Formulated without harmful ingredients, GM Collin prioritizes skin safety alongside clinical performance and efficacy

Advanced
Biotechnology

Innovative active ingredients backed by the latest scientific research deliver transformative results at the cellular level

Visible
Long-Lasting Results

Treatments produce tangible, lasting improvements in skin health, radiance, and resilience — results you can see and feel

Why GM Collin
Elvira's Choice
"GM Collin aligns perfectly with my philosophy — combining clinical science with a luxury experience to deliver real, visible results for every client."

— Elvira Kravtsov

  • Developed in Canada with over 60 years of dermatological research and innovation
  • Inspired by French luxury skincare philosophy — elegance meets efficacy
  • Used exclusively by certified professionals and luxury spas worldwide
  • High-performance formulations deliver visible results after just one treatment
  • Comprehensive range addressing all skin concerns — aging, acne, rosacea, sensitivity
  • Trusted by Elvira for its alignment with her commitment to skin health and results

Book a Consultation

Private Studio
The Studio Experience

Elvira's home-based studio in Charleswood is designed to offer you an experience that is as relaxing as it is results-driven — intimate, discreet, and entirely focused on you.

Private & Discreet

A fully private, one-client-at-a-time studio. No waiting rooms, no distractions — just you and Elvira in a calm, exclusive setting.

Secure & Safe

Strictly sanitary protocols and medical-grade hygiene standards maintained throughout every session for your complete peace of mind.

Luxury Treatment Bed

Professional-grade, fully adjustable treatment table with premium linens — ergonomically designed for your maximum comfort during every session.

GM Collin Products

Full access to the complete GM Collin professional skincare range — used exclusively in every treatment and available for your personalized homecare routine.

Clinical Equipment

State-of-the-art professional devices for microneedling, chemical peels, and advanced facial treatments — the same standards used at leading luxury spas.

Tranquil Atmosphere

Soft ambient lighting, calming music, and warm, welcoming décor — every detail of the studio is curated to make you feel at ease from the moment you arrive.

Free Parking

Complimentary, convenient parking right at the studio — no meters, no stress. Simply arrive, park, and walk straight in to your appointment.
